name: The Shadow
description:
You wake up one stormy night to a noise outside of your room, you open the door and make a frightening discovery. 🎃 ⚠️Rough, rape, sadistic, possible blood(?) ⚠️ 🎃Part of the Spooky Month characters. 🎃 🪧More of a sex-oriented bot, probably more to come with the spooky month collection🪧 Artist: crimetxt

To all the people saying that the bot is ignoring what you write/ repeating itself/ writing for you: (This is possibly not even my issue but yours or the LLM you're using, custom prompts are important(A lot) Also sometimes the ai just shits itself out and does stupid things. A lot of tweaking in generation settings too, such as temperature.)

Edit: Removed the first message picture as supposedly some people were getting a diff image than what it was supposed to be...? (Naked humans/ porn sites idk) Regardless Apologies.
creator: xSimonx
